== Notes for [[Item:Q101646|Q101646]] ==

Birth date of 25/11/1482 is rather unlikely, 1472 is assumed.

==Jakob Wyss III==

* Son of Jakob Wyss and Magdelene Spörri

* Gender: Male
* Birth: 1455
* Zurich, Zurich District, Canton of Zurich, Switzerland
* Death: 1475 (20) Switzerland
* Find A Grave Memorial - https://www.findagrave.com/memorial/135999195/jakob-wyss

Jakob Wyss BIRTH 1475 Zürich, Switzerland DEATH 1535 (aged 59–60) Switzerland BURIAL Endingen-Lengnau Jewish Cemetery Endingen, Bezirk Zurzach, Aargau, Switzerland PLOT Row 13, Grave 88. MEMORIAL ID 135999195 · View Source

MEMORIAL PHOTOS 0 FLOWERS 11 My relative, Jakob Wyss, was born 1475, in Weisslingen, Zurich. He married Margaret Schenkel (1487-1504), and died 1535, in Baden, Aargau. He is buried in Row 13, Grave 88.

==========================

Jakob Wyss Wysy
* MyHeritage Family Trees
* Richie family tree in Richie Web Site, managed by Keith Richie (Contact)
* Birth: Nov 25 1582 - Weisslingen, Zurich, Switzerland
* Death: 1535 - Baden, Aargau, Switzerland
* Parents: '''Jakob Wyss, Magdalena Wyss (born Spoerri)'''
* Siblings: Barbara Wyss, Markus Wyss, Marx Wyss, Anna Wyss, Heinrich Wyss, Anna Wyss, Regula Wyss
* Wife: Margaret Wyss (born Schenkel)
* Children: Zachariah Wyss Wyss, Barbara Wyss, Felix Wyss, George Wyss, Elisabetha Wyss, Elsbeth Wyss, Jakob Wyss, Anna Wyss

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9DCAB81EFBBFA9822EF79916C2AE3
geni:6000000024324193438

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
